# DX Wiki

Orient developers, coding agents, and maintainers.

The DX wiki is for developers, maintainers, and coding agents working inside this repo.

Wikiwiki is intentionally small: a TypeScript CLI, repo-local JSONL records, Zod validation, deterministic Markdown rendering, local search, and now an agent-mediated human wiki compiler. The command name is `wk`; `wikiwiki` remains as a compatibility alias.

The key maintenance rule is that `.wikiwiki/records/` is the source of truth. Generated record pages live in `wiki/`. Human-readable UX/DX pages live in `wiki/human/` and are published from compile drafts.

Start with [Developer Overview](./developer-overview.md) for the working model, [Architecture](./architecture.md) for the internals, [Developer Workflows](./workflows.md) for commands, [Symbols](./symbols.md) for key entry points, and [DX Decisions](./decisions.md) for technical rationale.
